title: The One That Got Away
relevance_summary: Weak private key generation leading to theft of 127,426 BTC worth over $14.8 billion
red_flags: Catastrophic security vulnerabilities exposed over five years
summary: LuBian, a Bitcoin mining pool, suffered a massive theft due to weak 32-bit entropy private key generation, which allowed attackers to brute-force the keys. The theft went unnoticed for five years, highlighting severe security flaws.
